docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR FAILURE OF PROPER SERVICE TO OUT OF STATE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF APOGEE MOTORS, REPRESETNED BY ROUSDAM DJORAEV, PRESIDENT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GEORGE PULARIANI IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED FEB-04-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PULARIANI, GEORGE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ROUSDAM DJORAEV, PRESIDENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOGEE MOTORS
REMARK: ORDER OF DISMISSAL SENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED: INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY APOGEE MOTORS AS TO DEFENDANT PULARIANI, GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR FAILURE OF PROPER SERVICE TO OUT OF STATE DEFENDANT.
